case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS COOPER, BARBARA C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FIRESIDE THRIFT CO, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $371.40 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $130.15 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C.
ORDER TO RECALL WRIT ISSUED ON 7/28/99 TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, FILED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,268.05 AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BARBARA C.
